title: ECA open letter to Ofgem on data
snippet:
Energy Consultants Association says non-domestic data access could become a huge issue for brokers

The post ECA open letter to Ofgem on data appeared first on Ene
ai_summary: ECA raises concerns with Ofgem about non-domestic data access for brokers, a potential regulatory issue affecting how I&C suppliers and brokers operate in the market.
ai_reasoning: Data access and broker relationships are operationally relevant to tem's B2B model, and an Ofgem intervention on this topic could reshape how tem interacts with intermediaries and accesses customer information. Not an immediate crisis but worth monitoring as it may affect competitive positioning.
